title: DiscordConfig
description: Per-channel TOML config for the Discord adapter (REST outbound + Gateway WebSocket inbound).

credential_handle.description: Key used to look up the bot token in the wcore-config credentials store (OS keychain by default).

allowed_channel_ids.description: Optional allow-list of Discord channel IDs (snowflake strings). When non-empty, inbound MESSAGE_CREATE events whose channel_id is not in this list are dropped before reaching poll_events.

intents.description: Discord Gateway intents bitmask. Default = (1<<9 | 1<<15) = GUILD_MESSAGES + MESSAGE_CONTENT (both required for inbound message text).

heartbeat_grace_ms.description: Grace window (ms) after a heartbeat for the HEARTBEAT_ACK to arrive before the gateway connection is treated as dead.
